name: Erika's Tangela
flavor_text: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

text.name: Gathering of Blossoms
text.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for an Erika's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

text.name: Bind
text.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Beautifly
flavor_text: Vibrantly patterned wings are its prominent feature. It sucks sweet flower nectar with its long mouth.

text.name: Stun Spore
text.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

text.name: Energy Straw
text.text: Your opponent reveals their hand, and this attack does 80 damage for each Energy card you find there.

name: Dustox
flavor_text: A nocturnal Pokémon. Drawn by streetlights, they messily eat the leaves of trees lining boulevards.

text.name: Boisterous Wind
text.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Flip a coin. If heads, put an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon into their hand.

text.name: Twilight Poison
text.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

name: Budew
flavor_text: The pollen it releases contains poison. If this Pokémon is raised on clean water, the poison’s toxicity is increased.

text.name: Itchy Pollen
text.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

name: Ethan's Magcargo
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives near the craters of volcanoes. It stores fire energy in its shell of cooled and hardened magma.

text.name: Melt Away
text.text: If this Pokémon has no Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

text.name: Lava Burst
text.text: Discard up to 5 {R} Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

name: Numel
flavor_text: The magma in its body reaches 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit. Its hump gets smaller when it uses Fire-type moves.

text.name: Incandescent Body
text.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Salazzle
flavor_text: When two Salazzle meet, they will use their pheromone gas to fight over the males in each other’s group.

text.name: Sudden Scorching
text.text: Your opponent discards a card from their hand. If this Pokémon evolved from Salandit during this turn, your opponent discards 2 more cards.

text.name: Flamethrower
text.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Scorbunny
flavor_text: Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet, raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny’s footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

text.name: Quick Attack
text.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

name: Psyduck
flavor_text: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

text.name: Damp
text.text: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose any Ability that requires the Pokémon using it to Knock Out itself.

name: Snorunt
flavor_text: In some snowy lands, certain folklore says a house will prosper if a Snorunt lives there.

name: Weavile
flavor_text: They travel in groups of four or five, leaving signs for one another on trees and rocks. They bring down their prey with coordinated attacks.

text.name: Hail Claw
text.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Heliolisk
flavor_text: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.

text.name: Frilled Generator
text.text: Once during your turn, if you played Canari from your hand this turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for up to 2 Basic {L} Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

text.name: Powerful Bolt
text.text: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

name: Vikavolt
flavor_text: When carrying a Charjabug, Vikavolt can receive electricity from it and then rapidly fire powerful electromagnetic beams from its large jaws.

text.name: Volt Switch
text.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched {L} Pokémon.

name: Iono's Wattrel
flavor_text: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

text.name: Quick Attack
text.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Marill
flavor_text: The oil-filled tail functions as a buoy, so it’s fine even in rivers with strong currents.

text.name: Hide
text.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

name: Misdreavus
flavor_text: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

text.name: Ascension
text.text: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Banette
flavor_text: This Pokémon developed from an abandoned doll that amassed a grudge. It is seen in dark alleys.

text.name: Cursed Words
text.text: Your opponent chooses 3 cards from their hand and shuffles those cards into their deck.

name: Togekiss
flavor_text: These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all.

text.name: Wonder Kiss
text.text: When your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out, flip a coin. If heads, take 1 more Prize card. The effect of Wonder Kiss doesn't stack.

name: Slurpuff
flavor_text: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.

name: Hop's Trevenant
flavor_text: Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It’s kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.

text.name: Horrifying Revenge
text.text: If any of your Hop's Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 100 more damage.

text.name: Corner
text.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Team Rocket's Mimikyu
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in dark places untouched by sunlight. When it appears before humans, it hides itself under a cloth that resembles a Pikachu.

text.name: Gemstone Mimicry
text.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Tera Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Team Rocket's Dugtrio
flavor_text: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

text.name: Holes
text.text: Whenever your opponent's Active Pokémon moves to the Bench during their turn, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

name: Hitmontop
flavor_text: It spins on its horn while dealing out elegant kicks. Its horn grows continuously through its lifetime.

text.name: Spin and Draw
text.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

name: Medicham
flavor_text: Through yoga training, it gained the psychic power to predict its foe’s movements.

text.name: Seventh Kick
text.text: If you don't have exactly 7 cards in your hand, this attack does nothing.

name: Carbink
flavor_text: Born from the high temperatures and pressures deep underground, it releases energy from the stone in its head.

text.name: Double Type
text.text: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is {F} and {P} type.

text.name: Counter Jewel
text.text: If your opponent has 2 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Mightyena
flavor_text: It will always obey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

text.name: Kick Away
text.text: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

name: Cynthia's Spiritomb
flavor_text: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

text.name: Raging Curse
text.text: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Cynthia's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

name: Galarian Obstagoon
flavor_text: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.

text.name: Scarring Shout
text.text: This attack does 70 damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

text.name: Punk Smash
text.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Mawile
flavor_text: Attached to its head is a huge set of jaws formed by horns. It can chew through iron beams.

text.name: Call for Family
text.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Dreepy
flavor_text: It has a habit of biting at Clauncher even though it doesn’t feed on them. This is said to be vestigial behavior from when Dreepy was alive.

name: Drakloak
flavor_text: This Pokémon stores up energy in its lungs, then shoots it out. It takes care of Dreepy and battles alongside them until they’re all grown up.

text.name: Recon Directive
text.text: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck.

name: Larry's Staraptor
flavor_text: It never stops attacking even if it is injured. It fusses over the shape of its comb.

text.name: Feathery Strike

flavor_text: There are several appliances that Rotom can inspirit, but the first one to be developed was the electric fan.
